arts.ttl: Man City 'add Tottenham defender to their list of summer targets' as Pep Guardiola steps up squad rebuild plans
arts.sum: The start of City's squad rebuild was brought forward to the winter, with Pep Guardiola 's side signing Omar Marmoush, Abdukodir Khusanov, Nico Gonzalez and Vitor Reis in January.

arts.ttl: Man City learn new timeline for 115 Premier League charges verdict
arts.sum: Manchester City are still waiting on the verdict of their long-running legal battle with the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Man City's 130 charges verdict given new date after Pep Guardiola prediction
arts.sum: A verdict on Manchester City's 130 charges may not be reached until the start of next season, following an independent hearing into allegations that the club breached financial fair play rules

arts.ttl: Man City 115 charges: Fresh timeline emerges for verdict from Premier League 'trial of the century'
arts.sum: Manchester City are reportedly unlikely to learn the outcome of the hearing into its 115 charges of alleged Premier League financial rule breaches until after the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Latest from Germany: Cesc Fabregas now in picture with Crystal Palace and Sheffield Wednesday managers for RB Leipzig
arts.sum: Cesc Fabregas has been added to RB Leipzig’s list of potential managerial appointments alongside Sheffield Wednesday’s Danny Rohl and Crystal Palace manager Oliver Glasner. That’s according to journalist Philipp Hinze, who reports that the former Premier League star, currently manager at Como, now finds himself on the list at the German side. arts.ttl: Preview: Manchester City vs. Crystal Palace - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Premier League clash between Manchester City and Crystal Palace, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Man City lineup vs. Crystal Palace: Predicted XI for Premier League clash
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Manchester City could line up for Saturday's Premier League clash with Crystal Palace.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace lineup vs. Man City: Predicted XI for Premier League clash
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Crystal Palace could line up for Saturday's Premier League clash with Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Man City 115 charges verdict 'unlikely' before summer
arts.sum: Announcement had been expected this spring but complexity of case means it is not imminent, per The Telegraph.

arts.ttl: Man City vs. Crystal Palace: Bold prediction made amid Champions League concerns before "absolute must-win" for Pep Guardiola's side
arts.sum: Man City expert Steven McInerney tells Sports Mole that he does not expect Pep Guardiola's side to qualify for next season's Champions League if they lose at home to Crystal Palace in the Premier League on Saturday.
